allowed_wording.nyc311: NYC311 is a low-opportunity fixed-case failure in which P3 removes one of two invalid fields together with seven contract-valid fields.
allowed_wording.sparse: The sparse failure is distributed across all four tasks and most mechanisms; deterministic selection frequently removes construction-defined legitimate signal fields, while recall and retention remain near other archetypes.

forbidden_wording.nyc311: NYC311 proves that MI fails on natural data.
forbidden_wording.sparse: Sparse signal concentration causally explains every MI failure.

nyc311.interpretation: NYC311 offers little initial repair opportunity. P3 removes one of two invalid fields together with seven contract-valid context fields, so deletion cost exceeds the small available strict-full distortion in this fixed case.

sparse.interpretation: The negative response is present in every sparse task and most mechanisms. Localization summaries do not show a gross recall or retention collapse relative to other archetypes; deterministic selection frequently removes the three legitimate fields that define the sparse generator's clean signal. This is a construction-grounded failure diagnosis, not a randomized causal decomposition.
sparse.scope: LR sparse archetype at 20% matched encoded-column cost
